nodes.name: get_image_embedding
nodes.docstring: Generates a CLIP embedding for a given image (PIL Image or path).

nodes.name: get_text_embedding
nodes.docstring: Generates a CLIP embedding for a given text.

nodes.name: cosine_similarity
nodes.docstring: Computes cosine similarity between two vectors.

nodes.name: normalize_score
nodes.docstring:
Normalizes a raw CLIP cosine similarity score (typically 0.15 - 0.45 range)
to a human-friendly percentage (0-100%).

nodes.name: process_tryon
nodes.docstring:
Process the virtual try-on request.
Returns bytes of the result image.

nodes.name: process_tryon
nodes.docstring:
Process the virtual try-on request.
Returns bytes of the result image.

nodes.name: get_index
nodes.docstring: Returns the Pinecone index, creating it if it doesn't exist.

nodes.name: upsert_vectors
nodes.docstring:
Upserts a list of vectors to Pinecone.
vectors: List of (id, embedding, metadata) tuples.

nodes.name: query_vectors
nodes.docstring: Queries Pinecone for the most similar vectors.

nodes.name: fetch_vectors
nodes.docstring:
Fetches vectors by ID.
Returns a dictionary of id -> vector data.

nodes.name: get_index_stats
nodes.docstring: Returns index statistics such as total vector count.
